dropzone_title: Drop document here or click to select
exp_1_text: Upload an image or a PDF into the left dropzone. Use Drag & Drop for maximum speed.
exp_2_text: Use your mouse to explicitly select the text columns or regions you want to convert into text.
exp_3_text: Powered by local Tesseract WebAssembly execution, your data remains yours. The OCR processing happens entirely offline inside your browser. No data is ever transmitted to external servers!
privacy: Privacy: Processed locally inside the browser. No data is sent out.
result_placeholder: The extracted result will appear here …
subtitle: Precise text extraction from images and PDF documents
tip_text: Tip: Draw rectangles on the document. You can move them, resize them at the edges, or delete them using the [Del] key.
